hotel_name: Khách sạn Sala Quy Nhơn Beach (Sala Quy Nhon Beach Hotel)

reviews.title: Needs improvement
reviews.text:
Room was underwhelming.  Huge floor to ceiling windows with a great view, but all the windows were too dirty to see out. 
Breakfast area…not very clean.  Tons of food on the floor.   Food left out without any heating burners.  Coffee machines indicated they required maintenance (cleaning).   The staff had no idea what that meant.   Hall ways never vacuumed.  
A loud commotion at midnight one night in our hallway.  Screaming went on for ages.  Security called.   No apologies from management. 
We paid for seven days and left after five.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Excellent. Best prepared, managed and delivered breakfast we had on a a road trip down south.

reviews.title: Breakfast is not good! Staff are nice until you need something
reviews.text: For being a "luxury" hotel, it's nice until you need something. Late checkout? That'll be extra. Food delivered to your room? Come get it yourself. Extra water? only 2 bottles per day. Not much to do in the town. The breakfast has a ton of options but nothing is really good. It's a really nice hotel but if they are going to be "luxury" there needs to be luxury amenities.

This is reasonable for 4 stars hotel. Room is clean but the negative is the bed is facing the glass with balcony. Day time is so bright to the bed. Recommend hotel should hang the shield curtain for better view and comfort. Overall this is good hotel. But not good for travelers are looking for ocean view room.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Interesting place. I stayed in the suite and the room was lovely, just like the pictures. Comfortable bed and really excellent views. The front desk staff were lovely and kind. The price was not low but also not extortionate. I must say that breakfast in hotel buffets in Vietnam around the 2tr price point is usually extremely disappointing – however, at this hotel the buffet was really impressive. This is a true plus. They could just improve their coffee a little. Quy Nhon itself is a really great destination. You can find things here that are hard to find in other parts of Vietnam – for example, coastal rocky hikes just 30 minutes' drive away where you will see nobody on the path, nobody trying to sell you anything, breathtaking views, etc.
reviews.negatives: I encountered a couple of roaches during my stay, but I know for a fact that this is an issue at all 'premium' properties in Quy Nhon, including fancy apartments in the FLC Sea Tower. The staff sent up a porter boy of about 19 to deal with it on my first night – he walked into the room in shoes and smashed it with a shoe and put it in the bin. The staff kindly gave me vouchers to apologise for the bugs, but, ludicrously, these vouchers only applied to the coffee shop or bar, and could not be used throughout the hotel, meaning they were rejected when I tried to use them to pay for 2 bottles of water from the minibar upon checkout. This is a classic issue of Vietnamese bureaucratic inflexibility – staff are terrified of incurring any cost to the business which has not been triple-red-stamped and approved by the big boss. More generally, staff in the breakfast room do not tell families to maintain basic standards of civility, including stopping their children from walking on the benches in shoes, screaming, or playing loud music from phones and iPads. This is completely incompatible with the high-quality hotel experience they want to be. I fully understand that normal Vietnamese expectations will not be offended by loud screaming at breakfast, but the hotel is trying to be international so it should train its staff by international standards. (The screaming and loud noise also applies to the lobby.) One more thing is that the pool closes ridiculously early. The whole fun of swimming pools at hotels is going in at night, getting drinks, etc. Having a pool that closes at 8pm is like living in an old people's home! They also need to clean the windows and external glass of the balcony more thoroughly. All of these suggestions are offered in a friendly spirit to the hotel leadership, in order to help it meet international standards.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Read to the end. Detailed pros and cons.

Room - I used a suite (large and L-shaped ocean view) and the room was nice. The bed was good and I slept very well. The blackout curtains worked well. The bathtub had hot water and was clean.

Kindness - Overall, everyone was kind, but the manager who spoke Korean was really friendly and it felt like he was earnestly trying to learn Korean. He seems to take pride in being someone who speaks Korean.

I only recommend visiting on Saturday to those participating in the barbecue. Due to the barbecue buffet, from 4 PM until 9 PM, I felt vibrations as if a subwoofer was on the lower floor, and the live band music was extremely loud, like being in the middle of a club. It was impossible to stay in the room. I was shocked as I came to relax in the suite. The staff member was very apologetic, but the reality is there was nothing that could be done. They said they would turn off the music by 9 PM, so I ran out of the hotel. I checked in at 2 AM after an overnight train, but this is just... 

Nonetheless, the location is truly good. The beach is right in front, making it very nice for walks. However, there are many hotels like this, so make sure to compare well. The breakfast was also decent. I've stayed at ten hotels in Da Nang, Hoi An, and Quy Nhon, and this was the best one.

The pictures of the swimming pool were a kick, but I didn't swim at all for three days. The sunlight was intense from the morning, making it difficult to use, and in the afternoon, it was half water, half people. Considering it was the off-season, this is surprising...? The swimming pool feels quite small compared to the photos. There weren't many sunbeds and there were too many people smoking. Is there really no designated smoking area, or is it just not enforced?

I booked a room smaller than the suite for 40,000-50,000 won, so I guess the satisfaction for the price was high.

reviews.title: Outstanding Hotel!
reviews.positives:
We loved everything about our stay here, starting from our check-in. Room is cleverly designed an tastefully furnished. Great view from the balcony (and it's safe for young children). Comfy beds and pillows. Good water pressure. Free bicycle rental. Refreshing rooftop pool (small, but it does the trick.) 

As far as breakfast buffets go, this one is exceptional (big variety and well managed), but we find it more rewarding to go out to a local Pho noodle shop in the mornings. Pho Dan (10 minute walk from the hotel) was great, and Vua Pho Bo was even better (about 7 minutes away via Grab Taxi). East West Craft Brewery has a tap room directly on the beach (just a 3 minute walk away).

The hotel arranged a motorbike rental for us with Cho thuê xe máy vivu for 150,000 VND per day. The bike was reliable and the service was very prompt (delivered directly to the hotel within minutes.

If you need some good advice or other assistance at the hotel, look for Phuong. She is very friendly, helpful and fluent in English. Other staff members do try their best with the help of Google Translate.
reviews.negatives:
The shower and bath tub are not separate, so you have to step into the tub to take a shower. If you're a bigger person like myself, be careful when stepping in/out. The tub is not securely attached to the floor, so if you step into the back end of the tub, it will rock / tip back, which could cause a fall.

They have those minibar coolers instead of actual fridges, which never get very cold, so we were constantly searching for ice in nearby convenience stores. 

Apart from the breakfast buffet, we were not impressed with their other food offerings. Their pizza was served on some kind of soft bread roll, which was "strange" (better go to East West or The Social Pub for a better pizza). The seafood buffet was not managed very well, and drinks (soft drinks, beers, etc) were served warm.

But none of these things would prevent us from staying here again.

reviews.title: Best accommodation in Guiyang.
reviews.text:
It was a place I chose after checking Agoda ratings and Google reviews. Although it was a hotel in the 60,000 won range, it was very satisfying. The location isn't right in front of the sea, but it is adjacent to the coastline, and the staff are really, really friendly. The breakfast, especially the pho, was delicious, and the room condition was excellent. If I visit again, I will come back to this place. The only downside is that the swimming pool is too small. It's unsuitable for swimming.

Tip: When going to the airport, it usually costs about 320,000 to 340,000 dong for Grab, but the hotel can book a taxi for you. You can go to the airport for 165,000 dong.

The location is another huge plus: just steps from the beach, making it incredibly easy to enjoy the ocean, sunrise walks, and relaxing evenings by the water.

The breakfast was amazing with plenty of selections for every taste.

What really set this experience apart, though, was the exceptional service from the customer engagement team. I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a spotless, beach-side property with true five-star hospitality and a team that makes you feel genuinely cared for.

reviews.title: A place that makes you feel special and appreciated!
reviews.positives: Wow. Wow. Wow. The staff go above and beyond to make you feel welcomed and valued. Even the guards at the basement parking are very nice and friendly. Staff are well trained and this is a hotel that treats you really well. So many amenities and the breakfast is truly 5 stars especially for Quy Nhon. I look forward to staying here with my family in the future. It is only a 2min walk to the beach (100m or less) and they even have pedal bikes you can borrow for free. They even did their research and learned it was my birthday during my last day there and prepared a delicious cake for me when I was checking out. I was truly touched and surprised.
reviews.negatives:
The rooftop pool is very small, almost like a large jacuzzi, and though clean and well-maintained, it could only comfortably hold 10-12 people before it got very crowded. You can not do laps since it's only 8m at its longest measurement, but it's perfect for young kids or cooling off in the hot afternoon. 

There is a gym hidden on the 2nd floor (secret elevator to access it), but the A/C wasn't working, and it was too hot to exercise there comfortably. 

Finally, I needed a quiet place to work, and sadly, there was no meeting room or quiet room to book or stay in when my room was unavailable (cleaning).  But aside from these small issues, I had a phenomenal time here for my 4 days during the Quy Nhon Maratho,n and I will be back for sure.

reviews.title: New and good hygiene
reviews.text:
Pros: New, clean and close to the beach. The bell door man ( Mr.Khang was very helpful and delicate to his job). The room was small but very clean and tidy, they take care every small details in the room to make sure you enjoy your stay. It’s was my husband’s birthday and Ms Thao ( from customer service department) prepared for him a cute little cake. We are very appreciate for that. 
Cons: Receptionists ( Ms Thu & Mr Thien) need to be trained more in hospitality fields, they should say hello to guests instead of waiting for guests to come all the way to them and say hello and tell them their names, our booking date and Ms Thu just told Ms Thien “ you do it”. I can’t see her position under her name tag as it was too small. 
I don’t need room services during my stays, I just called Room service department for a toilet paper and a tissues pack. However, they took too long without response so I have to call the reception to get it and when they brought the tissue they just gave us a few pieces with their hand ( non hygiene). 
All others experiences at the hotel was great and lovely, thanks Sala for the service. I recommend this hotel and will return next time. Cheers!

Thân gửi Quý khách,

Cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn Khách sạn Sala QuyNhon Beach cho chuyến đi của mình. Chúng tôi rất vui mừng khi biết rằng Quý khách hài lòng với các dịch vụ mà chúng tôi cung cấp.

Chúng tôi luôn nỗ lực không ngừng để mang đến những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời nhất cho mỗi vị khách thông qua dịch vụ tận tâm và chuyên nghiệp. Vì vậy, những đánh giá tích cực của Quý khách chính là nguồn động lực to lớn để tập thể nhân viên của chúng tôi tiếp tục cố gắng và phấn đấu hơn nữa.

Một lần nữa, chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn những lời nhận xét tốt đẹp và đầy thiện chí của Quý khách. Đây sẽ là động lực để chúng tôi duy trì và không ngừng nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ, nhằm mang đến trải nghiệm tốt nhất cho tất cả khách hàng.

Chúng tôi rất mong được chào đón Quý khách quay lại trong thời gian gần nhất.

Trân trọng,
Sala QuyNhon Beach Hotel

reviews.title: Thank you^^
reviews.text: I stayed in Sala for 5 nights. Since it was a solo trip, I booked a small room, but thankfully they upgraded me to a larger room with a nice view. Every day, breakfast included kimchi, and I enjoyed dinner with Vietnamese food even more. There are quite a few local eateries nearby. I had 10k coconut every day; after drinking it, if you ask them to cut the flesh for you, they will do so. It’s delicious. I noticed many things in the hotel that showed they care about customer convenience, such as bananas that gym-goers like to eat, comfortable chairs for waiting for the elevator, high-performance hair dryers, and snacks provided during my stay. The kindness of the staff was exceptional, even the housekeeping staff welcomed me with bright smiles. I had to go to the hospital because my allergic dermatitis worsened despite using pharmacy medicine and ointments. I still feel sorry and grateful thinking about it. Huy, the receptionist, accompanied me for 2 hours after his shift ended. I had travel insurance, and I learned that you don’t need an English diagnosis certificate or passport number to file a claim, which was a bit confusing, so I wanted to mention this in the review. Even when I checked out, other staff asked if I was okay, which really touched me. They also helped me book a sleeping bus to Da Nang, and later, after staying at another hotel, they called to check on me, which helped me safely wrap up my month-long stay. It was much cheaper than the booking site, and the pick-up and drop-off convenience was great. There’s a daily package tour product that other Koreans spoke highly of, but unfortunately, I already did a taxi tour, so I missed out on it. I still think how nice it would have been to spend the remaining 5 nights here. Huy expressed that he was happy to help customers, and he was truly a lifesaver.^^

reviews.text: It's so nice to take a walk on the beach watching the sunrise since it's close to the beach. I felt happy all the time, especially due to the kindness of the staff. The cleaning was done daily, so it was clean, and being newly built, the facilities were well-maintained. I think the breakfast was sufficient for this level. The pho was delicious, and the yogurt was tasty too. It's a great value first-class hotel that I highly recommend. There are no direct flights from Korea, making it hard to come, but if you do come, you'll be satisfied with Qui Nhon, a place I want to visit again. I want to recommend this hotel to my family!

Ich durfte für 6 Nächte in diesem tollen Hotel übernachten und Quy Nhon entdecken.
Grosses und neues Hotel direkt am Strand, sehr freundliches und aufmerksames Personal. Insbesondere Long an der Skybar und Nancy an der Rezeption haben meinen Urlaub verschönert, Dankeschön dafür!
Mein Zimmer lag in der 19. Etage mit direktem Meerblick und kleinem Balkon. Der Blick ist phantastisch 
Extra grosses Bett, war bequem vielleicht ein bisschen harte Matratze 
Der Reinigungsservice hat prima gearbeitet, vor allem diese riesen Handtücher rochen so lecker.
Das Frühstück hatte viel Abwechslung, es war alles vorhanden, was bei einem Asienurlaub zu erwarten war - also kein Käse :)
Die Eingangshalle ist groß mit bequemen Möbeln, immer frische Getränke im selfservice 
Es gibt ein Gym, einen kleinen Pool, verschiedene Restaurants 
Den Wäscheservice habe ich 2x genutzt, gute Leistung 
In meinen 4 Wochen Vietnam Urlaub war dieses Hotel mit großem Abstand das Beste!
Und Quy Nonh sollte bekannter werden, toller Ort

The breakfast menu changed slightly every day, so I never got bored eating it for 8 days. Right in front of the accommodation, there is a local market, and a WinMart is just a 5-minute walk away. Next to WinMart, there is an Exim Bank, making it possible to withdraw from Travelogue and Travel Wallet without any fees. I believe all my good memories from Quy Nhon were because of my stay at Sala Hotel. The male and female staff who spoke Korean well greeted me attentively every day. Als Dankeschön haben sie uns außerdem Mango gebracht, weil wir hier Langzeitgäste sind.

Die Kollegin von Guest Relations hat sich wirklich hervorragend um alles gekümmert absolut perfekt. Ihr Name ist Nensi. Sie hat uns eine sehr schöne Willkommenskarte mit einer lieben Nachricht geschrieben, die uns bei der Ankunft im Apartment erwartet hat. Außerdem hat sie sich um vegane Restaurants gekümmert, die wir brauchten, und generell um alles.

Obwohl das Wetter nicht besonders gut ist, macht das nichts , ich fühle mich im Sala Hotel wie zu Hause. Ein perfektes Hotel, absolut empfehlenswert!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Quá bất ngờ về khách sạn này luôn. Vốn dĩ, mình chỉ book 1 ngày ở đây, nhưng ngay khi nhận phòng thì mình đã quyết định thay đổi kế hoạch và book thêm 1 ngày nữa ở đây.
- khách sạn mới, và quá sạch sẽ
- nhân viên thì quá thân thiện và nhiệt tình, và quá chu đáo
- dịch vụ khách sạn thì tuyệt vời, họ đã linh động upgrade hạng phòng  mình từ deluxe city view lên hạng phòng family suit chỉ vì mình đã phải đợi 30p khi đến nhận phòng 
- breakfast thì ngon, và nhiều lựa chọn. Thức ăn thì luôn được làm đầy
- lại có xe đạo miễn phí cho mình đi dạo loanh quanh
Tóm lai, với mình thì khach sạn này không chỉ là đáng tiền mà phải nói là trên cả tuyệt voi
reviews.response:
Thân gửi Quý khách,
Cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn Khách sạn Sala QuyNhon Beach cho chuyến đi của mình. Chúng tôi rất vui mừng khi biết rằng Quý khách hài lòng với các dịch vụ mà chúng tôi cung cấp. 
Chúng tôi luôn nỗ lực không ngừng để mang đến những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời nhất cho mỗi vị khách thông qua dịch vụ tận tâm và chuyên nghiệp. Vì vậy, những đánh giá tích cực của Quý khách chính là nguồn động lực to lớn để tập thể nhân viên của chúng tôi tiếp tục cố gắng và phấn đấu hơn nữa.
Một lần nữa, chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn những lời nhận xét tốt đẹp và đầy thiện chí của Quý khách. Đây sẽ là động lực để chúng tôi duy trì và không ngừng nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ, nhằm mang đến trải nghiệm tốt nhất cho tất cả khách hàng.
Chúng tôi rất mong được chào đón Quý khách quay lại trong thời gian gần nhất.
Trân trọng,
Sala QuyNhon Beach Hotel

reviews.title: Topservice en warm personeel bij Sala Quy Nhon Beach Hotel
reviews.positives:
Ik heb een zeer aangenaam verblijf gehad in Sala Quy Nhon Beach Hotel. Het hotel is nog vrij nieuw, modern ingericht, zeer schoon en heeft een perfecte ligging vlak bij het strand. Wat mij vooral opviel, is dat het personeel duidelijk uitstekend getraind is: iedereen werkt professioneel, vriendelijk en met oprechte aandacht voor de gasten.
Het ontbijt was iedere ochtend uitstekend, met dagelijks verschillende gerechten en veel keuze. Extra complimenten voor Nhung, die heerlijke verse gerechten bereidt, vooral de Pho was bijzonder smaakvol en wordt ter plekke vers klaargemaakt.
Ook wil ik graag Hường bedanken. Hoewel zij nog in opleiding is, merk je meteen dat ze al zeer goed is ingewerkt en professioneel getraind. Ze is ontzettend vriendelijk, behulpzaam en straalt veel enthousiasme uit. Daarnaast verdienen Hiền, Thiện, Huy en Phương zeker een speciale vermelding. Zij zijn zeer bekwaam in het bedienen van gasten, beantwoorden met plezier alle vragen en doen werkelijk alles om ervoor te zorgen dat gasten zich welkom en tevreden voelen. Hun warme en professionele houding maakt echt het verschil.
Ook een groot compliment aan de rest van het team, van de schoonmaak tot de algemene serviceverlening. Iedereen draagt bij aan de warme sfeer en hoge kwaliteit van het hotel.
Kortom: een hotel waar service, gastvrijheid en kwaliteit echt centraal staan. Wat mij betreft verdient dit hotel zeker meer dan de huidige 4 sterren. Dankzij het hele Sala-team is mijn verblijf in Quy Nhon nog aangenamer geworden. Ik kom hier zeker nog eens terug.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.text: We had an amazing stay here.  The staff were so great, very attentive and helpful.  The breakfast buffet was outstanding!!  One of the best we have ever had with an incredible amount to choose from with a gorgeous room and view.  We didn't end up using the pool because it was so windy on the 25th floor but it was so nice to sit up there and enjoy the view.  The room was very big, beautiful and comfortable.  The location is very close to the beach, one of the food streets, and the main road with lots of restaurants.  We even took advantage of pre-booking a couple of bicycles available which was such a nice bonus.  Absolutely wonderful and great value.  Would highly recommend.

reviews.title: 청결하고 편리함 그리고 친절함ㄷ
reviews.positives:
오션뷰로 업그레이드 해주셔서 4박 있는 동안 찐으로 눈 호강 했습니다. 웰컴 음료랑 손수건 코코넛 과육도 괜찮았고 객실로 망고를 정성스럽게 서비스 해주었습니다. 새벅 5시반쯤 테라스에서 현지인들 에어로빅하고 바다 수영하는 모습을 보는 재미도 있었고 소방훈련이나 룸청소에 대한 안내서도 전달해 주어서 세심한 신경을 써준다는게 느껴졌습니다.
룸의 가구 배치도 편의성 있게 되어 있고 조식은 기대하지말고 드시면 좋을듯(김치 괜찮음. 바게뜨는 개선해야할듯.오믈렛은 다 익혀주면 좋을듯)
직원들도 웃으면서 인사도 잘 해주시고 무엇보다 1층 입구 직원이 항시 문 열어줌(내가 열면 안 되는 분위기)
안전함이 느껴지고 1층 셀프로 마시는 차가 시원하게 있음. 마지막으로 체크아웃 전날 과일과 손편지가 놓여있었습니다. 직원들은 정성과 노력이 마음으로 느껴졌어요. 한국 분들 옆 42층 호텔과 고민중이라면 살라 적극 권유합니다. 참고로 여기 4박 옆 5성급 3박 했습니다. 살라가 청결면에서 더 괜찮았고 스탭들 태도도 더 나은듯 합니다. 한국 분들 생각 보다 많아서 놀랬어요. 샤워기 필터(이 부분은 어쩔수 없는듯) 필수예요.
reviews.negatives: 조식 바게뜨와 체크아웃 체크시간이 3분컷으로 단축 되었으면 좋겠어요. 샤워기 필터는 필수예요

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.text: My family had the opportunity to stay at Sala Quy Nhơn Beach Hotel and overall we were very satisfied. The hotel is located right by the sea, just a crosswalk away from the beach. The view from the room overlooking the sea is very spacious and beautiful, especially in the morning and during sunset, which is quite chill. The location is convenient, close to the center, making it easy to move around for dining and sightseeing. The room is clean, modernly designed, with bright colors, and the glass balcony looking straight out to the sea creates a feeling of spaciousness and relaxation. The furniture is still new, the bed is comfortable, and the soundproofing is decent. The breakfast buffet is quite diverse for the price range, featuring both basic Vietnamese and Western dishes. There aren't too many high-end items, but the quality is good and the seasoning is just right. The restaurant area is beautifully decorated, with a spacious and bright atmosphere. The swimming pool is tidy and suitable for gentle relaxation. A major plus is the reasonable price considering the seaside location and quality of service. Overall: it is suitable for families or couples looking for a light getaway, who enjoy ocean view rooms, easy transportation, and a reasonable budget when coming to Quy Nhơn.

reviews.title: Excellent Honeymoon Stay with Ocean View
reviews.text:
We booked an Ocean View Suite at Sala Quy Nhon Beach Hotel for our honeymoon and had a very good experience. The service was outstanding — staff were professional, responsive, and handled requests efficiently.
The Ocean View room was clean, spacious, and well prepared, with a beautiful sea view that made the stay relaxing and suitable for a honeymoon. Amenities were complete and well maintained, including strong Wi-Fi, infinity pool access, and a comfortable room setup.
Breakfast was a highlight, offering a good selection of local Vietnamese food that was easy to enjoy and delicious. Check-in and check-out were smooth, and daily service was consistent.
Good value for the quality of service provided. Would recommend and stay again.

reviews.title: Review of the stay at Sala Hotel on the 15th.
reviews.text:
This is an honest review of my stay on the 15th. However, please keep in mind that it is a personal opinion. 
1st floor: As soon as I got out of the taxi, a hotel staff member warmly took my luggage. When checking in, they offered jasmine tea, dried ginger, and a wet towel. A staff member who speaks Korean (Trang) kindly assisted with the check-in and provided information about restaurants and cafes around the hotel. 
4th floor: There is a fitness center and a kids' room. The fitness center is small but clean and well-equipped with necessary machines. Towels, a water dispenser, and yoga mats are provided, and the air conditioner is always on and cool. 
5th floor: This is the floor where breakfast is served, and my experience over the 15 days of having breakfast was truly excellent. The chef's skills are top-notch, and the kindness of the staff is something I appreciate every time. Moreover, the menu changes slightly every day, allowing me to enjoy my meals over the 15 days. There are many Korean dishes (bibimbap, sticky rice, kimchi, tteokbokki, kimbap), which I think will appeal to Korean visitors. 
25th floor: The pool view is amazing. The pool is larger than I expected and great for swimming. The staff on the 25th floor are also excellent. They kindly provide towels and floats and are always friendly (for those who want to shower before swimming, there are separated male and female shower rooms and restrooms accessible by opening a door and going down stairs beside the pool). 
Room: Since it was a room upgrade period when I booked, I was assigned a side sea view room, which was nice as I could see both the city and the sea. The bed and pillows were comfortable, there’s a full-length mirror, everything was clean, the bathroom was spacious, and the lighting was just right... During my 15-day stay, there was nothing I felt dissatisfied with. They cleaned the room daily, and both the bedding and towels were clean. 
Other: Umbrellas, beach towels, and bicycles can be rented for free on the 1st floor. 

It's a perfect hotel!!

reviews.title: Wonderful stay at SALA Quy Nhon Beach Hotel
reviews.text:
We had a lovely stay at SALA Quy Nhon Beach Hotel. The beach-view room was beautiful, very clean, and tastefully decorated. Waking up to the ocean view was a highlight of our trip.

Breakfast was very good with a nice variety and fresh options. All the staff were extremely friendly, welcoming, and always helpful, which made our stay even more enjoyable.

We stayed for 3 nights, but it was definitely not enough — we truly wished we could stay longer. Quy Nhon is a great town with delicious food that is very affordable.

We would happily return to this hotel again.
